description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is primarily white and gray, with large rectangular windows and arched window accents on the upper floor. The property is surrounded by a tall, dark fence and features a lush landscaped yard with palm trees, flowering bushes, and a swimming pool. There is a covered carport attached to the house, and a paved pathway leads from the gate to the main entrance. The backyard includes a shaded pergola area and a small garden with additional greenery, creating a private and inviting outdoor space.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a landscaped yard with a pool, and a covered carport, all enclosed by a tall fence.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an elevated angle, highlighting the pool, pergola, and lush landscaping in the backyard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the house, featuring the main entrance, carport, and driveway gate, with the pool and pergola visible in the background.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the house, focusing on the flat roof, upper story, and the garden area with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a top-down perspective of the backyard, emphasizing the pool, lounge area, and the arrangement of palm trees and flowering plants.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a small overhang, adjacent to a covered carport and a gated driveway.
